channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-8184] Obsolete struct initiaizers
item.description:
There's a bunch of code that we need to convert to C99 style initializers in Lustre:

/libcfs/libcfs/linux/linux-debug.c:300:9: error: obsolete struct initializer, use C99 syntax
/libcfs/libcfs/linux/linux-debug.c:301:9: error: obsolete struct initializer, use C99 syntax
/libcfs/libcfs/linux/linux-debug.c:302:9: error: obsolete struct initializer, use C99 syntax
/libcfs/libcfs/linux/linux-debug.c:300:9: warning: obsolete struct initializer, use C99 syntax
/libcfs/libcfs/linux/linux-debug.c:301:9: warning: obsolete struct initializer, use C99 syntax
/libcfs/libcfs/linux/linux-debug.c:302:9: warning: obsolete struct initializer, use C99 syntax
/lustre/mdt/mdt_lvb.c:200:9: error: obsolete struct initializer, use C99 syntax
/lustre/mdt/mdt_lvb.c:201:9: error: obsolete struct initializer, use C99 syntax
/lustre/mdt/mdt_lvb.c:202:9: error: obsolete struct initializer, use C99 syntax
/lustre/mdt/mdt_lvb.c:203:9: error: obsolete struct initializer, use C99 syntax
/lustre/mdt/mdt_lvb.c:204:9: error: obsolete struct initializer, use C99 syntax
/lustre/mdt/mdt_lvb.c:200:9: warning: obsolete struct initializer, use C99 syntax
/lustre/mdt/mdt_lvb.c:201:9: warning: obsolete struct initializer, use C99 syntax
/lustre/mdt/mdt_lvb.c:202:9: warning: obsolete struct initializer, use C99 syntax
/lustre/mdt/mdt_lvb.c:203:9: warning: obsolete struct initializer, use C99 syntax
/lustre/mdt/mdt_lvb.c:204:9: warning: obsolete struct initializer, use C99 syntax
/lustre/obdclass/lprocfs_jobstats.c:480:9: error: obsolete struct initializer, use C99 syntax
/lustre/obdclass/lprocfs_jobstats.c:481:9: error: obsolete struct initializer, use C99 syntax
/lustre/obdclass/lprocfs_jobstats.c:482:9: error: obsolete struct initializer, use C99 syntax
/lustre/obdclass/lprocfs_jobstats.c:483:9: error: obsolete struct initializer, use C99 syntax
/lustre/obdclass/lprocfs_jobstats.c:480:9: warning: obsolete struct initializer, use C99 syntax
/lustre/obdclass/lprocfs_jobstats.c:481:9: warning: obsolete struct initializer, use C99 syntax
/lustre/obdclass/lprocfs_jobstats.c:482:9: warning: obsolete struct initializer, use C99 syntax
/lustre/obdclass/lprocfs_jobstats.c:483:9: warning: obsolete struct initializer, use C99 syntax

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: Closing as duplicate of LU-6210.
This is a duplicate of LU-6210
